channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Australian Government Offers Support to Iranian Women’s Soccer Team Seeking Asylum
item.description: Five members of the Iranian women's national soccer team have been granted humanitarian visas to remain in Australia after a tense escape from their handlers on the Gold Coast. The players, including ...

item.title: Surrey Police investigator Alex Bromley describes her work tracking child abusers on the dark web and the challenges of rising online threats
item.description: Alex Bromley, a civilian investigator with Surrey Police, is one of the few UK specialists dedicated to identifying paedophiles on the dark web. Her work involves scrutinising minute details in videos...

item.title: Ramazan Fosters Harmony Between Hindus and Muslims in Mithi, Sindh
item.description: In Mithi, a town in Sindh with a majority Hindu population, Ramazan has become more than just a religious observance; it has evolved into a symbol of interfaith solidarity. Many Hindus in the city als...

item.title: PDP Board of Trustees Meeting Scheduled by Wike Faction After Court Ruling
item.description: Following the Court of Appeal verdict wey confirm say the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) National Convention wey happen for Ibadan, Oyo State last November 2025 no get legal backing, the Wike-led fact...

item.title: Bianca Censori reportedly documents personal experiences during marriage to Kanye West
item.description: New reports indicate that Australian model Bianca Censori has been privately documenting her experiences throughout her marriage to Kanye West, which began in late 2022 following West's divorce from K...

item.title: Conflicting Statements on Iran War Amid Worsening Global Oil Crisis
item.description: The conflict between the US, Israel, and Iran has escalated, with Tehran signaling readiness for a prolonged war and dismissing diplomacy. In interviews, Iranian officials warned that the conflict wou...

item.title: Opposition Moves Resolution Against Lok Sabha Speaker Amid Protests in Budget Session
item.description: On 10th March 2026, the Parliament's Budget Session began on a tense note, with both Houses witnessing disruptions. In the Rajya Sabha, Opposition leaders protested against the Special Intensive Revis...

item.title: Canadian Coast Guard captain dismissed for failing to respond promptly to distress call in P.E.I.
item.description: The Canadian Coast Guard has dismissed Captain Lou Callaghan after a federal labour board determined he 'willfully' ignored distress calls from a sinking mussel boat, Knot a Chance, in the treacherous...

item.title: APC Sets Up Campaign Council to Boost Oyebanji’s Chances in Ekiti Governorship Election
item.description: For Ekiti State matter, APC don inaugurate 57-member Governorship Election Campaign Council for Ado-Ekiti. Senate Leader, Senator Opeyemi Bamidele, wey be Chairman of di council, yan say APC go secure...

item.title: International Crisis Group warns that further delaying BARMM elections to 2028 risks deepening MILF divisions and threatening peace process gains
item.description: A report from the International Crisis Group released on March 10, 2026, warns that pushing back the first parliamentary elections in the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM) to 202...

item.title: BDMLR recruits more volunteers amid rising UK cetacean strandings
item.description: The British Divers Marine Life Rescue (BDMLR) is calling for additional volunteers to assist with the increasing number of live strandings of whales, dolphins, and porpoises on UK shores. Director of ...

item.title: Sustainable Use and Development of Africa’s Inland Valleys
item.description: In Africa, inland valleys are very important for rural communities. Dem researchers from AfricaRice visited some inland valleys in Gagnoa, Côte d’Ivoire, to learn from local farmers about the challeng...

item.title: Sindh government introduces austerity steps to manage fuel consumption amid oil crisis
item.description: In response to rising fuel prices caused by the ongoing Iran war, the Sindh government has introduced a set of austerity measures to conserve energy and reduce government spending. The decisions come ...

item.title: Father charged with murder after son allegedly stabbed at Gold Coast residence
item.description: A tragic incident unfolded on the Gold Coast, where a 54-year-old father has been charged with murdering his 34-year-old son at their home in Maudsland. The alleged attack occurred around 6:40 pm on M...

item.title: G7 finance ministers address energy security but stop short of calling for end to US-Israel-Iran conflict
item.description: The recent G7 finance ministers’ meeting fell short of directly addressing the escalating conflict between the US, Israel, and Iran, despite mounting global concerns. Oil prices have surged to around ...

item.title: Supreme Court examines IT Rules to balance free speech and fake content concerns
item.description: On 10th March 2026, the Supreme Court emphasised the need to balance the fight against fake online content with protecting citizens' fundamental right to free speech. The Centre clarified that the Inf...

item.title: Sindh Government Announces School Closures and Friday Work-from-Home for Austerity Amid Economic Pressures
item.description: The Sindh government has introduced a series of austerity measures to reduce expenditure and cope with the economic fallout from regional tensions, particularly the impact of rising global oil prices ...

item.title: SM Supermalls Highlights Women’s Leadership and Innovation at 6th International Summit
item.description: SM Supermalls marked the 6th International Women’s Summit under the theme “The Future is Hers. Create. Lead. Thrive.” at Samsung Hall, SM Aura, in celebration of the 115th International Women’s Day. T...

item.title: EACOP Launches School Programme to Support Girls with Menstrual Hygiene
item.description: Dar es Salaam — The East African Crude Oil Pipeline (EACOP) project imeanza program ya kwanza ya kuisaidia shule kuhusu usafi wa hedhi kwa wasichana, inayoitwa 'Keep a Girl in School' chini ya mpango ...

item.title: Kenyan Student Earns Graduate Assistantship and Tuition Relief at Indiana University of Pennsylvania
item.description: Erastus Mwangi, a Kenyan from Korogocho, Nairobi, is celebrating after securing a full graduate assistantship at Indiana University of Pennsylvania, which covers half of his tuition fees and provides ...
